data.description: Belarus: Sergei Aleinik has been appointed as the national coordinator for achieving sustainable development goals

data.title: DWAYNE JOHNSON'S TEREMANA® TEQUILA BRINGS PEOPLE TOGETHER TO RECONNECT AT THE TABLE WITH "SHARE THE TABLE, SHARE THE MANA"
data.description: The renowned brand has launched a unique initiative in partnership with Timeleft, aiming to foster togetherness and unity nationwide. This groundbreaking experience and social movement are inspired by the concept of Mana. On April 28, 2026, in Los Angeles, the brand announced the initiative, which has won multiple awards. In a society where face-to-face interactions are dwindling, this project aims to bring people closer together through innovative means.

data.title: St. Regis Hotels & Resorts Debuts in the Heart of Budapest Honouring the Heritage of the Exquisite Klotild Palace
data.description: A renowned hospitality brand, St. Regis Hotels & Resorts, is continuing its tradition of exceptional service and luxury by expanding its presence to Hungary. On April 28, 2026, The St. Regis Budapest was unveiled in Budapest, situated in a prestigious architectural landmark. This debut marks an exciting milestone for the brand, bringing its celebrated legacy to the heart of Hungary.

data.title: Wilbur Labs 2026 Startup Failure Report Reveals AI Is the Top Threat for Half of Startup Founders
data.description: In Miami on April 28, 2026, a report by Wilbur Labs was published regarding startup failure in 2026. According to the report, technological disruption, notably AI, was identified as the primary threat to companies by half of the founders, accounting for 50% of respondents. Furthermore, 59% of founders expressed worry about their...

data.title: Dreame Unveils PowerSight 40V Series at DREAME NEXT Launch Event 2026: Smart Display, Stable Power, Eco-Friendly Garden Care
data.description: On April 28, 2026, in San Francisco, Dreame Technology, a renowned company in high-end consumer electronics and intelligent manufacturing, started its much-awaited DREAME NEXT launch event at the prestigious Palace of Fine Arts. The event is scheduled to run from April 27 to April 30, 2026.

data.title: OpenTable Launches Inaugural U.S. Restaurant Ambassador Council
data.description: Leaders in the hospitality industry throughout the United States are set to provide practical experience and firsthand knowledge to contribute to the development of strategy and innovation with OpenTable's Advisory Board. The announcement was made by OpenTable on April 28, 2026, in San Francisco. The company introduced its U.S. Restaurant Ambassador initiative, where these industry experts will collaborate, sharing insights to drive progress.

data.title: Vultr Deploys NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Nano Omni to Streamline Multimodal Enterprise Agent Systems
data.description: In West Palm Beach, Florida, Vultr, the world's biggest privately held cloud infrastructure company, has announced an extension of its partnership with NVIDIA. They have deployed the NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Nano Omni, a top-notch open multimodal model that provides advanced reasoning and understanding with exceptional accuracy. Vultr now offers developers the capability to utilize Nemotron 3 Nano Omni on specialized NVIDIA GPU clusters and also access it through Vultr's serverless inference service accelerator.

data.title: Cornelis Expands Global Partner Ecosystem to Accelerate High-Performance Networking for HPC and Data-Intensive Workloads
data.description: Cornelis, a prominent provider of intelligent networking solutions, based in Wayne, Pennsylvania, has announced its expansion of the global partner ecosystem. This will include the incorporation of new federal integrators and distribution channels. The objective behind this move is to enhance accessibility to CN5000 high-performance networking solutions. Consequently, resellers, system integrators, and managed service providers will have greater opportunities to provide scalable AI and HPC infrastructure. This will result in improved application performance and reduced total infrastructure costs.

data.title: Workhuman Elevates Deskless Work Experience, Setting a New Bar for Frontline Recognition Worldwide
data.description: In FRAMINGHAM, Massachusetts, and DUBLIN, Workhuman®, a global leader in employee recognition, has unveiled its latest innovation, the Frontline Recognition Experience. This new offering combines frontline recognition throughout the entire workforce ecosystem into a unified platform, prioritizing the inclusion, visibility, and appreciation of frontline workers. Designed to fill a significant industry need, Workhuman's solution consolidates physical and remote workforce recognition, promoting a cohesive employee experience.

data.title: ETCOG Awards Civic Marketplace to Expand Cooperative Purchasing for Rural Communities, Schools, and Local Districts
data.description: In Kilgore, Texas, the East Texas Council of Governments (ETCOG) has chosen Civic Marketplace for COGWORKS, a move that will extend access to compliant and cost-effective procurement opportunities throughout East Texas.

data.title: Ronald McDonald House Greater Hudson Valley Elects Municipal Credit Union’s Toni-Ann Sforza to Board of Directors
data.description: In Hudson Valley, New York, the MCU Foundation, the charitable branch of Municipal Credit Union (MCU), and Ronald McDonald House of the Greater Hudson Valley (RMHGHV) have revealed the appointment of Toni-Ann Sforza as Chief Operating Officer (COO) of MCU to the Board of Directors of RMHGHV. Sforza, with over 20 years of expertise in financial services and organizational development, joins the board during a period of growth and influence for RMHGHV. Sforza, currently serving as COO of MCU, will bring her leadership experience to the board.

data.title: PANTHERx® Rare Pharmacy Earns 2026 MMIT Patient Choice Award for Patient Satisfaction
data.description: In Pittsburgh on April 28, 2026, PANTHERx® Rare, a renowned provider of patient access and support services for personalized rare disease care, was honored with the 2026 MMIT Patient Choice Award in the Independent Specialty Pharmacy division. This recognition was presented at a ceremony held by Asembia.

data.title: Ivan Soto-Wright Delivers Keynote at JA Miami's Largest-Ever Company Program Competition
data.description: On April 13, 2026, Ivan Soto-Wright, the CEO and Founder of MoonPay and the Soto-Wright Foundation, gave a keynote speech at Miami-Dade College during the 4th Annual Company Program Competition held by Junior Achievement of Greater Miami. The event drew in a crowd of (number) attendees as Soto-Wright shared insights and perspectives with the participants. The event showcased innovative ideas and talents of young entrepreneurs in the Miami area, highlighting the importance of fostering business skills among the youth. Soto-Wright's presence at the competition added significant value to the occasion, further elevating the reputation and success of the event.

data.title: Appian Congratulates 2026 Partner Award Winners for Delivering Impact with AI and Process Orchestration
data.description: In Orlando, Florida on April 28, 2026, Appian revealed the recipients of the Partner Awards during its worldwide conference, Appian World. The winners, acknowledged for their inventive solutions on the Appian Platform, have made a substantial client impact. Appian, listed on Nasdaq as APPN, hosted the event where these outstanding partners were celebrated for their achievements.

data.title: Herbal Supplements Market to Reach USD 75.41 Bn by 2031 Driven by Growing Demand for Plant-Based Remedies, Reports Mordor Intelligence
data.description: In Hyderabad, India, on April 28, 2026, it was reported that the herbal supplements market is expected to experience significant growth. Mordor Intelligence forecasts an increase in market size from USD 57.03 billion in 2026 to USD 75.41 billion by 2031, reflecting a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 5.75% during the period of 2026 to 2031. This growth is attributed to changes in consumer lifestyles...

data.title: Resolutions at ASSA ABLOY AB's Annual General Meeting April 28, 2026
data.description: On April 28, 2026, the Annual General Meeting of ASSA ABLOY AB took place in Stockholm, Sweden. During the meeting, the income statements and balance sheets were approved, and discharge from liability was granted. The event marked a significant moment for the company as they assessed their financial standings and operational performance.

data.title: Allied Market Research: Demand for Bone Health Supplements is Expected to Hit $23.1 billion by 2034, Growing at a CAGR of 5.3%
data.description: The global market for calcium, vitamin D, collagen, and glucosamine is witnessing a surge in demand driven by factors such as the increasing prevalence of osteoporosis, a growing geriatric population, and rising awareness about preventive healthcare. According to Ken Research, these trends are contributing to the expansion of the market. As of April 28, 2026, in PORTLAND, Ore., it is reported that the market is experiencing significant growth as these key factors continue to drive demand.
